mapper.select: select student_code as studentCode, full_name as fullName, english_name as englishName, email, sex_label as sexLabel, lead_mentor as leadMentor, assistant_name as assistantName, school, major, graduation_year as graduationYear, high_school as highSchool, postgraduate_plan as postgraduatePlan, visa_status as visaStatus, target_region as targetRegion, recruitment_cycle as recruitmentCycle, primary_direction as primaryDirection, secondary_direction as secondaryDirection, phone, wechat_id as wechatId from osg_student_profile where user_id = #{userId} limit 1

select field_key as fieldKey, field_label as fieldLabel, old_value as oldValue, new_value as newValue, status, date_format(submitted_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as submittedAt from osg_student_profile_change where user_id = #{userId} order by change_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into osg_student_profile ( user_id, student_code, full_name, english_name, email, sex_label, lead_mentor, assistant_name, school, major, graduation_year, high_school, postgraduate_plan, visa_status, target_region, recruitment_cycle, primary_direction, secondary_direction, phone, wechat_id ) values ( #{userId}, #{studentCode}, #{fullName}, #{englishName}, #{email}, #{sexLabel}, #{leadMentor}, #{assistantName}, #{school}, #{major}, #{graduationYear}, #{highSchool}, #{postgraduatePlan}, #{visaStatus}, #{targetRegion}, #{recruitmentCycle}, #{primaryDirection}, #{secondaryDirection}, #{phone}, #{wechatId} )
mapper.update: update osg_student_profile set phone = #{phone}, wechat_id = #{wechatId}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into osg_student_profile_change ( user_id, field_key, field_label, old_value, new_value, status, submitted_at ) values ( #{userId}, #{fieldKey}, #{fieldLabel}, #{oldValue}, #{newValue}, 'pending', sysdate() )
